seo.title: 1 Crore, 2 Crore, or 5 Crore? Find YOUR Number Today
seo.description: In our last video with Sneha Jain, we uncovered why retirement planning can’t wait and how to start thinking about your “Number.” 👉 In this short video,

takeaways.text: Your Number is the specific corpus you actually need, and knowing it turns vague saving into clear direction and peace of mind.
Time is framed as the most powerful factor in wealth creation, so how early you start can matter as much as the target you set.
Real planning means accounting for expenses, inflation, risk cover, and plain discipline, not just picking a big figure.
The target is yours to define, whether that is 1 crore, 5 crore, or 10 crore, so the work is finding the number that fits your life.
This short builds on the earlier conversation with Sneha Jain, founder of Wealth Trust, on why retirement planning cannot wait.
